name: istra
description: Durable local project memory for open-ended work in Codex.

interface.longDescription: Read a project's current pulse before work, search its durable history, capture decisions and issues, and record a closing checkpoint through Istra's local MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Open my current Istra project pulse and help me continue.
Capture this decision and record a closing checkpoint.
Search my Istra project memory for related issues.
